name: overstepping-gold
status: validated starter gold (directional smoke-test, NOT kappa)
provenance: positives = purpose-built minimal pairs (stance is the only variable); hard-negatives = real-mined (HC3 + public humanizer repo)

rounds.round1: 6 fixtures; positives confounded by verbosity (agreed for wrong reason); 3 hard-negatives clean. Positives discarded.
rounds.round2: 8 fixtures (5 built positives + 3 real hard-negatives); 7/8 agreed; N5 ambiguous -> dropped.

discrimination: kept set splits cleanly: 4 positives -> 'over' (rewrite better), 3 hard-negatives -> 'clean' (don't change). 100% owner-agreement on kept items.
key_insight: Over-stepping is real ONLY when the presumed prior X is a manufactured strawman. When X is a genuinely common belief, the same 'you assume X / not-X-but-Y' framing is a LEGITIMATE correction (or ambiguous). This validity-condition is the judge's core test and applies across ALL sub-types (it is why N5 '推荐=猜喜好' was ambiguous but N2 'more data=better model' was clear over-stepping). Therefore the judge must stay advisory, never a CI gate.

gold.label: over
gold.original: Can you set this up yourself? Yes — and it's simpler than you might think.
gold.clean: You can set this up yourself; it's fairly simple.

gold.label: over
gold.original: You probably assume more data always means a better model, but data quality matters more than quantity.
gold.clean: Data quality matters more than quantity for model performance.

gold.label: over
gold.original: When you hear "caching," you picture some magic speed boost. In reality, it's just a smaller, faster store of recent results.
gold.clean: A cache is just a smaller, faster store of recent results.

gold.label: over
gold.original: 要不要自己写个爬虫？要，而且比你想象的简单。
gold.clean: 自己写个爬虫是可行的，也不复杂。

gold.label: clean
gold.original: Imagine that you are holding an apple in your hand and you want to cut it in half with a knife.

gold.label: clean
gold.original: 爱并不是一种感觉，而是一种行为。

gold.label: clean
gold.original: 真正的转型不是看投入绝对值，而是看投入是否匹配到能产生实际改变的最小单元。

dropped.reason: owner=ambiguous: '推荐系统=猜你喜欢什么' is a semi-real common belief, so the correction may be legitimate. Boundary case — dropped per 'ambiguous fixtures are bad fixtures'.
dropped.original: 你可能以为推荐系统就是猜你喜欢什么，其实它更多是在做排序和过滤。
